notes: v2.5.2 - Fixes the BOM on-screen save issue from the last update: editing a part's location, kitting status, revision, hidden state, or details now sticks instead of flickering back (your data was always saved on the server; this makes the screen match). mBOM detail edits save reliably and the eBOM opens expanded. Travelers: long traveler pages scroll all the way down again so the completion, scrap, supply, equipment, and employee-log sections are reachable, and a scrapped part's Scrap Log ID is now readable and clickable to the Scrap page. Builds: a new 'Show finished' toggle in the build selector. Workforce Planner: per-department weekend and daily overtime controls, plus week/2-week/month/quarter/6-month/year timeframes at day/week/month/quarter scale and clickable demand bars.
